entry.title: SAP Security and GRC
entry.content: Hi All ,

entry.title: Fiori App Screen Variants
entry.content:
Hi Community,
I have a requirement where I need to disable certain fields, tabs for an fiori app and to enable for certain users only.

Earlier via SAP GUI, we were able to achieve this via SHD0 but for UI5 Fiori app I am not sure how to achieve this. Any assists are appreciated.

entry.title: Hi, Can Adapt UI be restricted at user level?
entry.content: Hi, Can Adapt UI be restricted at user level?

entry.title: S/4HANA Security Guidance- 2024
entry.content:
What are the best practices for implementing the SAP S/4HANA security baseline? We have defined parameters and critical authorization in our SAP ECC systems as per security baseline. Are there any new parameter or crtical authorizations have been introduced in S/4HANA which we have to take care of and can be mentioned in baseline security guardrails of an organisation.

Happy to hear from anyone who has worked on this and share their experience.

entry.title: Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations Ownership
entry.content:
Team,
Please let me know which SAP Functional Team [ SAP HCM etc...] or SAP Technical Team should be ROLE OWNER [ Role assignment approver or Role Content Approver] for Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations. Also, please share location of relevant documentation - if available. 

Thanks

Raj

entry.title: User parameters cleared automatically(SU01 code)
entry.content:
Experts,

User parameters(SU01) got deleted automatically for a handful of users. They use abapCRM WebUI for business transactions. 

I found SAP Note 2020718 for this issue. However, when I tried to replicate the problem based on the steps mentioned in the note, I noticed that user parameters were not wiped off. I didn't find any other note or thread related to this behavior. 

Can you please suggest any solution for this behavior? 

Thanks

Bharth

entry.title: SAP malware scanning service in CAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We've a requirement where we need to integrate SAP Malware Scanning service with our CAP/UI5 application. If you have any insights or suggestions, we would greatly appreciate your assistance. 

Thank you for your attention to this issue. We look forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

Adarsh

entry.title: Troubleshooting 431 Status Code When Creating a SAMLAssertion Destination in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Issue Overview:

I’m facing an issue while setting up a SAMLAssertion destination in SAP BTP. I’m encountering a 431 status code when checking the connection for the destination. The 431 status code stands for "Request Header Fields Too Large". This error indicates that the request headers being sent to the server are exceeding its size limits. In my case, this is happening while using SAMLAssertion as the authentication method for an SAP destination.

From what I understand, SAML tokens can sometimes become quite large, and this can cause issues when they are passed in the request headers. However, I’m not sure how to proceed in resolving the issue.

Details of the Issue:

  • Setup: SAMLAssertion-based authentication for an SAP destination.
  • Error: When I attempt to check the connection, I receive a 431 status code.
  • Potential Cause: The error might be related to the size of the SAML token or other header fields being sent as part of the request. However, I haven’t been able to identify the exact cause or find a solution.

Seeking Suggestions:

I’ve done some research, but I haven’t come across a definitive solution yet. I’m reaching out to the community to see if anyone has encountered a similar problem and managed to resolve it.

  • Has anyone faced this issue with SAMLAssertion destinations?
  • What are some potential ways to reduce the header size in such cases?
  • Could the issue be related to proxy or gateway limits? If so, what adjustments helped?

Any advice or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

 

 

Destination

 

Fiori Genrator

 

Conclusion:

Dealing with a 431 status code while using SAMLAssertion in SAP is proving to be quite a challenge. I’d love to hear from anyone who has tackled this issue or has insights into potential solutions.

entry.title: Include Workflow tasks in authorization role on productive system
entry.content:
Hello,

we built a new authorization role on the S/4 development system including several workflow tasks.
After transport of the role into our test system, the workflow components were not included in the role anymore and had to be added manually in PFCG.

This is okay for the test system. But our authorizations are strictly limited on the productive system and no one is allowed to change roles on the productive system directly.

How can we achive a transport of the role including the workflow tasks, or is there any other solution to add these to the role?

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: Forward SAP Audit Logs to SIEM Solution
entry.content:
Hi,

As per government norms we have to store logs for at least 6 month, We have manageengine log360 SIEM Solution to store logs centrally.

SAP's .AUD file is not readable due to sap's security policies, is there any other way to forward audit logs to SIEM Solution.

We have to forward audit logs SIEM Solution.

entry.title: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help with your inputs on the below case.

We have one HANA Stored Procedure. This is a directly created as a Catalog object by some Developer & that got migrated to Production as well.  He is the Owner of that Procedure , as its created by his ID.

Now that Developer has left the Organization , we want to grant that Procedure ( Catalog object) with EXECUTE privilege to some Technical ID which needs to call that procedure from external system ( ex: Informatica).

How can we assign that access to that technical ID , as the Developer is no longer available? 

In this case SYSTEM user also will not have access to grant access to other except the Owner.

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: SAP SLICENSE - Warning Message while Login after we renewed it
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

In GGP Production system, we have renewed our SLICENSE for our corresponding Hardware key.

Even though, we are getting the warning pop message while login to the system.

Could you please help to fix this issue.

Regards,

Krishna

entry.title: User needs only display access in EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app in SAP S4 Hana Production.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We received a request from the user who needs only display access in EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app for Spain entity in SAP S4 Hana Production.

We tested the EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app in the QS4 Test environment, and it allows all operations, including change/cancel/delete/submit. Even activity is limited with "Display".

Could you please check and let us know if there is any feasibility to restrict only display version.

Regards,

Srinu Nelli

SAP Security & GRC

entry.title: Editing Logon Credentials to the Customer Remote Logon Depot in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Hello

Did someone know how to edit Logon Credentials to the Customer Remote Logon Depot in SAP for Me.
I have EDIT ALL LOGIN DATA authorization in my S-USER.
I can create credentials, but can't edit it.
Thanks

entry.title: USMM2 measurment 1160 fails with error You are not authorized to execute this program.
entry.content:
In my monthly run of USMM2 in a SAP ERP 7.50 system, the Measurement of application 1160 ("SAP Solutions by OpenText") fails with an error "You are not authorized to execute this program." (Message no. /OTX/PF09_M_001023). Apparently this is a new measurement, because it is not present in last month's report. 
In september we updated component OTEXVIM to version 80700_006, SP 0005.
Did anyone else encounter the same error and have any idea how to solve the authorization issue?

entry.title: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE80/SU21 after S/4 HANA 2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
After the system upgrade from S/4 HANA 2021 to S/4 HANA 2023, the Where-Used List for authorization objects in SE80/SU21 disappeared.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Same profile naming in development and quality systems
entry.content:
Hi,
SHD an SHQ were our development and quality systems, but now, we have a new system:
SDH (development system)
SQH (quality System)
So, when we created new role and a new profile is assigned automatically in old systems, this profile name was T-SDxxxxxx (DEV) and T-SQxxx (QAS) respectively.
Now, when we create new roles and profiles automatically in new systems, the profile name begins with same nomenclature T-SHxxxx and it is generating incidents.
Could you please help us with this issue?
Is these any OSS Note to apply? or could you tell us how change the beginning of the profile name T-YYxxxxx?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: OAuth 2.0 client to access external service provider resource
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to implement an OAuth2.0 connection between SAP and an external service provider. I went through all relevant material ranging from creating a profile through to configuring a client (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/3c4e8fc004cb4401a4fdd737f02ac2b9/81c09e3f183e49e4b1eb6959ccbe6e84.html?version=7.5.6 and sub-sections). Then I have a test ABAP program to test the configuration and get an authorization code using the authorization endpoint; after that, I want to call the access token endpoint to get the access token and start calling the resources I want using the obtained access token. The external service provider requires an Authorization Code grant type to be obtained before using it to invoke the access token endpoint.

I have the following questions:

1) according to https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/3c4e8fc004cb4401a4fdd737f02ac2b9/d7b8d91ad2ef40e6aee5fb071bb75193.html?version=7.5.6, I create an http client but the URL is the target endpoint of the requested resource?

2) when I use the set_token method of the OAuth2.0 client instance - created using the client profile and client configuration - I get the following exception message:

"No access token available for current user."

I attach screenshots from the configuration of the client (transaction OA2C_CONFIG):

The following part of the configuration screen has pre-filled value in the placeholder "Target Endpoint" and it is editable. Do I have to modify it or leave it as it is? if I have to modify it, what value from the service provider should I specify?

Also, the Redirection URI is non-editable and is made up of the Redirection URI server and other stuff.

Does anyone have any example implementations of such a scenario where we want SAP to consume protected resource in an external service provider? 

Thank you in advance,

Konstantinos

entry.title: Integrating authorizations for external applications in Public Cloud and Tools
entry.content: Is it possible to use SAP Public Cloud as a platform to manage authorizations for both SAP and external applications? If so, what tools are available to facilitate this process?

entry.title: we require non expiry sap user ID for the interface with other software's
entry.content:
Hi,


we are using the SAP user id to post the interface data in to the sap and we maintained the sap user id and password in the all interface API and CPI to post the data in sap s4 PERSON_NAME. but every 6 months sap user id password is expiring due to that interfaces are failing.


we required non expiry password for SAP user id to use in the interface.


 


Regards,


Manjunatha Reddy.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
